ul.li: f(3.14): JIT Fail -> Deopt -> Interp -> Result: 16.28

div.p: Insight: Guards enable fast speculation while maintaining full language semantics via deoptimization.
Speculation: x is INTEGER Based on 1000 profiling calls all with integer arguments
JIT -> Interp Mapping: rdi (3.14 float) -> stack[0] interp.pc = bc + 0x05
Stack: [3.14 (float)] Bytecode PC: 0x05 0x05: LOAD_ARG 0 0x06: PUSH 2.0 0x07: MUL
